code-context-paper-retrieval.description: Retrieves code-context-relevant papers from the local knowledge base before code modifications. Compatibility alias for papers-query-knowledge-base code-context mode.

domain-fork.description: Adapts ResearchFlow workflow concepts, skills, and folder structure to another professional domain. Explicit trigger only.

idea-focus-coach.description: Guides research ideation from broad thoughts to a focused, testable plan with explicit scope cuts, prioritized hypotheses, and immediate next experiments. Calls papers-query-knowledge-base for local KB evidence and web search for frontier context. Use when the user wants co-creation and step-by-step narrowing, not review verdicts. Can be used independently from reviewer-stress-test.

notes-export-share-version.description: Converts internal research notes into shareable Obsidian-friendly Markdown files. Use when the user explicitly asks to make a share version, export a note for sharing, hide knowledge base traces, replace internal wiki links with public paper links, rewrite internal wording for external readers, or generate a content-driven share filename.

paper-report.description: Generates deep structured reports for single papers with formula derivation, pipeline module decomposition, experiment analysis, and recursive related work. Use when the user asks for a deep report, detailed paper analysis, or 公式推导 for a specific paper.

papers-audit-metadata-consistency.description: Runs a unified metadata consistency audit across obsidian-vault/analysis logs and analysis notes, checking title/venue/year/category consistency, link/pdf_ref completeness, duplicates, and structure anomalies; writes quality_report_*.md under obsidian-vault/analysis.

papers-batch-analyze.description: Batch-analyzes papers from a user-provided CSV or `obsidian-vault/paper_list.csv`. Splits the list into `obsidian-vault/batches/<run_id>/batch_0001.csv` files, coordinates 4 parallel worker agents over 4 batches by default, writes analysis notes under `obsidian-vault/analysis/`, isolates failures per batch, and runs `papers-build-index` after completed batches.

papers-build-index.description: Builds/refreshes `obsidian-vault/index/index.jsonl` and aggregate Obsidian navigation pages from `obsidian-vault/paper_list.csv` when present, enriched by `obsidian-vault/analysis/` frontmatter when available. Use after completed analysis batches or when users ask to rebuild the local paper index.

papers-collect-from-github-repo.description: Collects paper candidates from any GitHub repository README or docs. Agent fetches the relevant Markdown, analyzes its format, writes a one-off parser, and outputs rows aligned with `obsidian-vault/paper_list.csv`. No pre-built scripts — agent adapts to each repo's format on the fly.

papers-collect-from-web.description: Collects paper candidates from web URLs by fetching and storing pages locally, then appending rows to `obsidian-vault/paper_list.csv`. Use when the user provides URLs + keyword constraints + venue/year and wants candidates added to the unified paper list.

papers-download-from-list.description: Uses colocated paper download tools to download, verify, and repair local PDFs from curated candidate lists so that `obsidian-vault/paperPDFs/` stays complete and deduplicated. Use when you have a curated paper list and want all corresponding PDFs downloaded/checked before analysis or index rebuild.

papers-query-knowledge-base.description: Queries the local obsidian-vault/analysis notes for research. Finds papers by title, topic, method, dataset, venue, or year; summarizes methods and evidence across papers; cites core_operator and primary_logic from analysis frontmatter. Includes code-context mode for retrieving paper evidence before code modifications. When obsidian-vault/index/index.jsonl is present, reads it first for fast filtering.

research-brainstorm-from-kb.description: Explores and structures research ideas into `obsidian-vault/ideas/` notes using the paper knowledge base and frontier techniques. Use when the user provides research questions or ideas and wants decomposed candidate directions, related-work analysis based primarily on obsidian-vault/analysis, with obsidian-vault/index used as the generated index/navigation support layer when helpful, plus cross-domain support from image/video generation, MLLM, Agent, or RL.

research-workflow.description: Unified entry for the research pipeline. Maps current work to one stage (import-local-pdfs/collect/download/analyze/build/query/ideate/focus/review/audit/export), recommends the right existing skill/command, supports step-by-step and end-to-end guidance, and keeps stage boundaries clear without duplicating underlying capabilities.

reviewer-stress-test.description: Runs a strict-but-fair ICLR/CVPR/SIGGRAPH reviewer challenge on idea, roadmap, or full paper, with major-risk diagnostics and actionable repair paths. Use when the user wants high-pressure review questioning instead of brainstorming. Can be used independently from idea-focus-coach.

rf-obsidian-markdown.description: Obsidian Flavored Markdown conventions for ResearchFlow. Defines wikilink, embed, callout, frontmatter, and tag rules that all .md-generating skills must follow. Ensures output renders correctly in Obsidian reading view, graph view, and backlink panels. Adapted from kepano/obsidian-skills.

skill-fit-guard.description: Detects recurring skill mismatch patterns after a skill call and asks whether to revise the skill spec.

write-daily-log.description: Generates or updates a structured daily research log from git diffs, artifacts, and conversation context.
